news.title: Fed Balance Sheet Edges Higher to $6.675 Trillion as of April 2, 2026
news.desc: The U.S. Federal Reserve's balance sheet expanded modestly to $6.675 trillion as of April 2, 2026, marking a slight uptick after an extended period of quantitative tightening. The Treasury General Account (TGA) stood at $848B while reserve balances remain in focus as the Fed manages liquidity conditions.

news.title: 美联储缩表预期升温叠加2026年降息路径展望
news.desc: 纽约梅隆银行宏观策略团队指出，随着政策环境变化，关于缩表路径与准备金水平的讨论持续升温。当前美联储资产负债表中，银行准备金已成为最大负债项，市场预期美联储可能在2026年下半年启动降息周期，ON RRP余额已降至极低水平。

news.title: Factors Affecting Reserve Balances — H.4.1 Release (April 9, 2026)
news.desc: The Federal Reserve's latest H.4.1 statistical release (April 9, 2026) details current factors affecting reserve balances, including securities holdings, the Treasury General Account, overnight reverse repo (ON RRP) facility usage, and bank reserve levels — key inputs for tracking U.S. dollar liquidity conditions.
